top_quartile_pattern: Single threshold plus owner and date
bottom_quartile_pattern: Milestone statement broad or changes cycle-to-cycle
interpretation_note: Clarity improves diligence speed more than slide polish

top_quartile_pattern: Top risks with mitigation deltas every cycle
middle_quartiles_pattern: Risks listed with limited movement tracking
bottom_quartile_pattern: Risks implied but not managed explicitly
interpretation_note: Risk ownership quality is a trust signal

top_quartile_pattern: Each spend bucket tied to evidence unlock
middle_quartiles_pattern: Partial mapping with weak threshold detail
bottom_quartile_pattern: Capital ask disconnected from proof milestones
interpretation_note: Capital logic should be explicit in investor updates

middle_quartiles_pattern: Mostly stable cadence with occasional resets
bottom_quartile_pattern: Frequent format shifts and metric redefinitions
interpretation_note: Cadence consistency is a confidence signal
